name: agentic-sdlc
description: Autonomous SDLC workflow powered by specialized AI agents. Includes a general-purpose Dev agent for everyday tasks and a full SDLC Orchestrator for feature development with spec trail. Agents: dev, orchestrator, PO, architect, CTO, implementor, QA lead, tech writer, PR reviewer, explorer, Athena, PRD analyst, RFC writer, and estimator.
